div1.entryFree:
Stubbornness, 1) obstinacy, contumacy: to persever in obstinate condolement is a course of impious s. Hml. I, 2, 94.
2) roughness, harshness: translate the s. of fortune into so quiet and so sweet a style, As II, 1, 19. even his s., his checks, his frowns . . . have grace and favour in them, Oth. IV, 3, 20.
